message:
chore: fix clippy lints across leaf crates and sync beads tracker

Leaf crate lint fixes:
- Remove redundant .max(0) on unsigned types (osc.rs, lineedit/mod.rs)
- Use C string literals (c"charset") instead of b"charset\0" casts
  in fontconfig FFI (fcwrap.rs)
- Qualify mem::transmute with explicit types (fcwrap.rs)
- Replace manual loop counters with zip-range idioms (luahelper,
  term/screen.rs, terminalstate/performer.rs)
- Remove redundant .into_iter() calls (harfbuzz-wasm, terminfo.rs)
- Remove unnecessary cast (umask)
- Allow clippy::too_many_arguments in toast-notification dbus

Syncs .beads/issues.jsonl with current tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -284,7 +284,7 @@ impl<T: BufferItem> Buffer<T> {
         Buffer {
             glyphs: infos
                 .into_iter()
-                .zip(positions.into_iter())
+                .zip(positions)
                 .map(|(i, p)| T::from_c(i, p))
                 .collect(),
             _ptr: ptr,
